title: Darling Dear
excerpt: I love how eclectic and adorable this new collection from Studio Calico is. Darling Dear is the perfect balance of cute mixed with holiday, finished off with a bit of an edge. And since my little Bamboo girl is fierce…
body:
I love how eclectic and adorable this new collection from Studio Calico is. Darling Dear is the perfect balance of cute mixed with holiday, finished off with a bit of an edge. And since my little Bamboo girl is fierce but looks just like a dainty deer, I thought this collection was a perfect fit for these photos. (3x3 Instagrams printed by Persnickety Prints on matte card stock).

Check out the Studio Calico blog for more layouts using Darling Dear.
